label: Product Profile
definition: A detailed evaluation of a specific vendor's product, including features, competitive positioning, and buying recommendations

label: Distributed Object Computing
definition: Technology domain covering object request brokers and distributed computing middleware

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Qualitative and quantitative assessment of industry trends, competitive dynamics, and market conditions using publicly available information

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Structured analysis of specific vendor strategies, product positioning, and competitive strengths and weaknesses

label: Field Research
definition: Primary research conducted through direct interaction with products, services, or market participants in real-world settings

label: Vendor-Provided
definition: Data provided by the vendor (Dell) including pricing, service specifications, and program details

label: Standards Body
definition: Industry consortium or organization developing technical standards

label: Systems Integrator / Partner
definition: Professional services or systems integration firm

label: Research Firm
definition: Industry analyst and research organization

label: Acquired
definition: Entity acquired by another company; brand may no longer exist independently

label: Active
definition: Technology is currently actively maintained, developed, and commercially available

label: Merged
definition: Organization merged with one or more entities to form new entity

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer in active use or commercial support; superseded by successor technologies

label: Legacy
definition: Product no longer actively marketed but may still receive limited support

label: Evolved
definition: Technology has transformed into or been succeeded by modern equivalent

label: Niche
definition: Technology persists in specialized or niche markets

label: Digital UNIX
definition: Digital's Unix operating system for Alpha hardware

label: ULTRIX
definition: Digital's older Unix variant for VAX hardware

label: OpenVMS Alpha
definition: Digital's OpenVMS on Alpha architecture

label: OpenVMS VAX
definition: Digital's OpenVMS on VAX architecture

label: Windows 3.1
definition: Microsoft Windows 3.1 on Intel

label: Windows NT Intel
definition: Microsoft Windows NT on Intel architecture

label: Windows NT Alpha
definition: Microsoft Windows NT on Alpha architecture

label: HP-UX
definition: Hewlett-Packard Unix

label: AIX
definition: IBM AIX Unix

label: OS/2
definition: IBM OS/2

label: SunOS
definition: Sun Microsystems SunOS Unix

label: Solaris
definition: Sun Microsystems Solaris Unix

label: Macintosh System 7
definition: Apple Macintosh System 7

label: Tandem Integrity
definition: Tandem Computers Integrity series (MIPS-based)

label: Tandem NonStop Kernel
definition: Tandem Computers NonStop Kernel fault-tolerant OS

label: IBM MVS
definition: IBM Mainframe MVS (forthcoming in v2.6)

label: OS/400
definition: IBM AS/400 OS/400 (forthcoming in v2.6)

label: Windows 95
definition: Microsoft Windows 95 (forthcoming in v2.6)

label: Silicon Graphics IRIX
definition: Silicon Graphics IRIX Unix (forthcoming in v2.6)

label: Pricing
definition: Product or service pricing information

label: Product Specification
definition: Technical specification or product capability detail

label: Competitive Position
definition: Study-specific code: competitive-position

label: Customer Segment
definition: Target customer or market segment description

label: Architecture
definition: Technical architecture or design characteristic

label: Future Roadmap
definition: Planned product capability or enhancement

label: Analyst Assessment
definition: Analysis based on Aberdeen Group analyst evaluation and judgment

label: Market Context
definition: Broader market or industry context finding

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospective record of what actually happened to a company, product, or technology after the study date; used to assess prescience

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Observation records an analyst judgment, interpretation, or recommendation that goes beyond raw data to offer evaluative conclusions

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data point about market size, pricing, cost structures, or commercial dynamics derived from research

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Empirical evaluation of a specific technology product or system based on hands-on testing, performance measurement, or documented behavior

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Observation is a forward-looking prediction about future market conditions, technology adoption, or business outcomes made at time of study

label: Document Review
definition: Assessment based on review of published documentation such as vendor support policies and threat databases
